graphql/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version that supports Java 21.
graphql/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

graphql/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21.
graphql/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 16, resulting in bytecode incompatible with the target Java 21 runtime or missing Java 21 language features.
